% sos2cayley evenblocks.sos --rename a=a,!a=b
% Generated by sosl.sos.viz. Styles are centralized in the \tikzset below:
% edit a style to restyle, edit a coordinate to move a node.
\documentclass[tikz,border=4pt]{standalone}
\usetikzlibrary{arrows.meta,shapes.geometric}
\begin{document}
\begin{tikzpicture}[
  class/.style     = {draw, thin, ellipse, inner sep=1pt, minimum width=9mm, minimum height=6.5mm},
  root/.style      = {dashed, draw=black!40, text=black!40},
  idem/.style      = {very thick},
  letter a/.style = {solid},           % display letter a
  letter b/.style = {dashed},           % display letter b
  tree/.style      = {semithick, -{Stealth[length=4pt,width=3pt]}},
  nontree/.style   = {thin, -{Stealth[length=4pt,width=3pt]}},
  cyc/.style       = {double, double distance=0.8pt},
  pairs/.style     = {anchor=north, font=\small},
]

  \node[class,root] (eps) at (1.0,2.5) {$\varepsilon$};
  \node[class] (a) at (5.2,4.2) {$a$};
  \node[class,idem] (b) at (5.2,0.8) {$b$};
  \node[class,idem] (aa) at (9.6,3.6) {$a{\cdot}a$};
  \node[class] (ab) at (9.6,6.4) {$a{\cdot}b$};
  \node[class] (ba) at (9.6,0.8) {$b{\cdot}a$};
  \node[class,idem] (aba) at (14.0,6.4) {$a{\cdot}b{\cdot}a$};
  \node[class,idem] (bab) at (14.0,1.5) {$b{\cdot}a{\cdot}b$};

  \draw[letter a,tree] (eps) to (a);
  \draw[letter b,tree] (eps) to (b);
  \draw[letter a,tree,cyc] (a) to[bend left=12] (aa);
  \draw[letter b,tree] (a) to (ab);
  \draw[letter a,tree,cyc] (b) to[bend left=12] (ba);
  \draw[letter b,nontree] (b) to[loop above] (b);
  \draw[letter a,nontree,cyc] (aa) to[bend left=12] (a);
  \draw[letter b,nontree] (aa) to (b);
  \draw[letter a,tree,cyc] (ab) to[bend left=12] (aba);
  \draw[letter b,nontree] (ab) to[loop above] (ab);
  \draw[letter a,nontree,cyc] (ba) to[bend left=12] (b);
  \draw[letter b,tree] (ba) to (bab);
  \draw[letter a,nontree,cyc] (aba) to[bend left=12] (ab);
  \draw[letter b,nontree] (aba) to (bab);
  \draw[letter a,nontree] (bab) to[loop above] (bab);
  \draw[letter b,nontree] (bab) to[loop below] (bab);

  \node[pairs] at (7.5,-0.5) {$P = \{\, ([b],[b]),\; ([a{\cdot}b],[b]),\; ([b{\cdot}a],[a{\cdot}b{\cdot}a]),\; ([a{\cdot}b{\cdot}a],[a{\cdot}b{\cdot}a]),\; ([b{\cdot}a{\cdot}b],[b]),\; ([b{\cdot}a{\cdot}b],[a{\cdot}b{\cdot}a]) \,\}$};
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{document}
